title: System and Method for Permanent Hair Depigmentation via AAV-Mediated Follicular Melanocyte Ablation
author: MJ Stephenson
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This deposit contains a manuscript entitled "System and Method for Permanent Hair Depigmentation via AAV-Mediated Follicular Melanocyte Ablation" by MJ Stephenson (University of Waterloo). The work presents a systematic computational feasibility analysis of a two-component gene-directed enzyme prodrug therapy (GDEPT) system for selective ablation of hair follicle melanocytes using AAV-delivered HSVtk under tyrosinase promoter control, combined with systemic ganciclovir administration. Quantitative modelling of transduction efficiency, bystander kill-zone geometry, microneedle array coverage, and melanocyte stem cell targeting probability is presented. This record is embargoed pending intellectual property review and patent filing.
